en: Now muster your troops, O daughter of troops; siege is laid against us; with a rod they strike the judge of Israel on the cheek.
zh: 女子啊！現在你要聚集成隊； 仇敵正在圍攻我們； 他們用杖擊打以色列執政者的臉頰。

en: But you, O Bethlehem Ephrathah, who are too little to be among the clans of Judah, from you shall come forth for me one who is to be ruler in Israel, whose origin is from of old, from ancient days.
zh: 伯利恆以法他啊！ 你在猶大諸城中雖然細小 ， 必有一位從你那裡出來，為我作以色列的統治者； 他的根源從太初， 從亙古就有了。

en: Therefore he shall give them up until the time when she who is in labor has given birth; then the rest of his brothers shall return to the people of Israel.
zh: 因此，耶和華必把以色列人交給敵人， 直到那要生產的婦人生下孩子來； 那時，他其餘的兄弟， 就必歸回以色列人那裡。

en: And he shall stand and shepherd his flock in the strength of the LORD, in the majesty of the name of the LORD his God. And they shall dwell secure, for now he shall be great to the ends of the earth.
zh: 他必站立起來， 靠著耶和華的能力， 靠著耶和華他 神之名的威嚴， 牧養他的羊群； 他們必然安居， 因為那時他必尊大， 直到地極。

en: And he shall be their peace. When the Assyrian comes into our land and treads in our palaces, then we will raise against him seven shepherds and eight princes of men;
zh: 這就是那帶來太平的。 亞述人入侵我們的國土， 踐踏我們宮殿的時候， 我們就要興起七個牧者； 八個作領袖的人攻擊他。

en: they shall shepherd the land of Assyria with the sword, and the land of Nimrod at its entrances; and he shall deliver us from the Assyrian when he comes into our land and treads within our border.
zh: 他們必用刀劍治理亞述地， 必用劍鋒治理寧錄地； 亞述人入侵我們的國土， 踐踏我們境界的時候， 他必拯救我們脫離亞述人的手。

en: Then the remnant of Jacob shall be in the midst of many peoples like dew from the LORD, like showers on the grass, which delay not for a man nor wait for the children of man.
zh: 那時，雅各的餘民， 必在許多民族中， 像從耶和華那裡降下的露水， 又像甘霖降在草上， 不期望於人， 也不等候世人。

en: And the remnant of Jacob shall be among the nations, in the midst of many peoples, like a lion among the beasts of the forest, like a young lion among the flocks of sheep, which, when it goes through, treads down and tears in pieces, and there is none to deliver.
zh: 那時雅各的餘民， 必在萬國中， 在許多民族裡， 像樹林裡百獸中的獅子， 又像幼獅在羊群中； 他若經過， 就必踐踏、撕碎， 沒有人可以拯救。

en: Your hand shall be lifted up over your adversaries, and all your enemies shall be cut off.
zh: 願你的手舉起高過你的敵人， 願你的一切仇敵都被剪除。

en: And in that day, declares the LORD, I will cut off your horses from among you and will destroy your chariots;
zh: 耶和華說：“到那日， 我必從你中間剪除你的馬匹， 毀滅你的車輛，

en: and I will cut off the cities of your land and throw down all your strongholds;
zh: 拆毀你國中的城市， 傾覆你的一切保障；

en: and I will cut off sorceries from your hand, and you shall have no more tellers of fortunes;
zh: 我必從你的手中除掉巫術， 你那裡就不再有占卜的；

en: and I will cut off your carved images and your pillars from among you, and you shall bow down no more to the work of your hands;
zh: 我必從你中間 除掉你雕刻的偶像和柱像， 你就不再跪拜 你手所做的；

en: and I will root out your Asherah images from among you and destroy your cities.
zh: 我必從你中間除滅你的亞舍拉， 毀滅你的偶像。

en: And in anger and wrath I will execute vengeance on the nations that did not obey.
zh: 我必在忿怒和烈怒中， 向那些不聽從的列國施行報復。”
